title: SENIOR SERVICES - 211info
text: IRCO SENIOR SERVICES CENTER SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals, naturalization assistance, homebound assistance, limited transportation assistance, case management, health and wellness activities, and focal point leadership for older adults and their caregivers. An Information and Assistance specialist is available to provide information and referrals. 10165 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 60 and older. Some services have income eligibility criteria. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Meals: Varies (503) 484-8800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 484-6371 Intake (503) 484-8800 Transportation and Information Transportation Services (503) 484-8800 Referral Line (503) 484-6371 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Sliding scale fee for Oregon Project Independence (OPI) services. Some services are free. DOCUMENTS: ID for most services. For Naturalization services, permanent residency (green card) is required. LANGUAGES: English, Arabic, Vietnamese, Russian, Ukrainian, Spanish, Nepali, Burmese, and a few African languages are spoken by staff. Phone interpretation available for other languages. AREA SERVED: Citizenship program: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties OPI: 82nd to 162nd and from the Willamette River to the Columbia River Services: Case/Care Management * Older Adults Friendly Outreach Programs Home Delivered Meals Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services * Older Adults Leadership Development * Older Adults Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Specialized Information and Referral * Older Adult/Aging Issues Transportation Passes * Older Adults Wellness Programs * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IRCO SENIOR SERVICES CENTER
